mapper.sql: id, name, type, coach_id, start_time, end_time, capacity, booked_count, price, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM course ORDER BY start_time ASC

SELECT
FROM course WHERE coach_id = #{coachId} ORDER BY start_time ASC

SELECT
FROM course WHERE status = 1 AND booked_count < capacity AND start_time > NOW() ORDER BY start_time ASC

SELECT
FROM course WHERE coach_id = #{coachId} AND status = 1 AND ( (start_time <= #{startTime} AND end_time > #{startTime}) OR (start_time < #{endTime} AND end_time >= #{endTime}) OR (start_time >= #{startTime} AND end_time <= #{endTime}) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course (name, type, coach_id, start_time, end_time, capacity, booked_count, price, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{type}, #{coachId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{capacity}, #{bookedCount}, #{price}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE course SET booked_count = booked_count + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE course SET booked_count = booked_count - 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND booked_count > 0
